metadata.title: Teralife - Your Wellness, My Commitment
metadata.description: Discover Teralife products that will transform your health and wellness. Personalized advice and nanotechnology products for your integral well-being.

hero.name: Charles Aguilera
hero.description: I help you transform your health and wellness with cutting-edge nanotechnology products. My mission is to accompany you on your path to a healthier and fuller life.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Learn my story and my passion for wellness
about.bio: I'm passionate about integral wellness. My journey with Teralife began when I discovered how these products transformed my own health. Since then, I've dedicated myself to sharing these benefits with everyone seeking to improve their quality of life.
about.mission: My mission is to provide personalized advice to find the products that best suit your specific needs.

items.name: Maria Gonzalez

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.subtitle: I'm here to advise you
contact.description: Have questions about the products or want personalized advice? Don't hesitate to contact me. I'm here to help you find the solutions your body needs.

form.title: Send me a message
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell me, how can I help you?

cta.title: Ready to transform your wellness?
cta.subtitle: Take the first step towards a healthier life. Contact me today and discover how Teralife can help you.

items.question: What is nanotechnology in Teralife products?
items.answer: Nanotechnology allows reducing particles of active ingredients to nanometric sizes, which significantly increases their absorption and bioavailability. This means your body makes much better use of each product.

items.question: How soon will I see results?
items.answer: Results vary by person and product. Generally, clients report noticeable improvements between 2 to 4 weeks of constant use. However, I recommend at least 3 months of use for optimal results.

items.question: Do the products have side effects?
items.answer: Teralife products are formulated with natural ingredients and are safe for consumption. However, I always recommend consulting your doctor if you have any specific health condition or take medications.

items.question: How can I buy the products?
items.answer: You can contact me directly on WhatsApp to receive personalized advice and place your order. I'll guide you to choose the most suitable products for you.

items.question: Do you ship nationwide?
items.answer: Yes, we ship nationwide. Shipping times and costs vary by location. Contact me for more details.

items.question: Can I become a Teralife distributor?
items.answer: Absolutely! Teralife offers an excellent business plan for entrepreneurs. If you're interested in generating extra income while helping others improve their health, contact me and I'll explain how to join the team.

footer.description: Your wellness is my commitment. I accompany you on your path to a healthier life with Teralife nanotechnology products.
footer.disclaimerText: Teralife products are dietary supplements and are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Consult your doctor before using any supplement.
